creator: ivan.lago@ifom-ieo-campus.it
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Ivan Lago
>Organization:	European Institute of Oncology
>Confidential:	no 
>Synopsis:	re: ports/110396: PATCH: Upgrade /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2 to version 2.0.2
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	medium
>Category:	ports
>Class:		maintainer-update
>Release:	FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE i386
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD cups-ieo.ifom-ieo-campus.it 6.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 6.2-RELEASE #2: Wed Jan 24 14:54:42 CET 2007 root@void:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VOID i386
>Description:
	The previous patch no longer applied after ports/98287 was committed. Here is the correct patch
>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:
--- syslog-ng2.0.2.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/Makefile syslog-ng2-new/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/Makefile	Mon Mar 19 07:28:09 2007
+++ syslog-ng2-new/Makefile	Mon Mar 19 10:29:28 2007
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	syslog-ng
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.balabit.com/downloads/syslog-ng/2.0/src/
 
@@ -25,6 +24,8 @@
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	glib-2.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/glib20 \
 		evtlog.0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/eventlog
+
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-dynamic-linking --mandir=/usr/local/man
 
 .if defined(WITH_TCP_WRAPPERS)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-tcp-wrapper
diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/distinfo syslog-ng2-new/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/distinfo	Tue Nov 14 13:46:33 2006
+++ syslog-ng2-new/distinfo	Mon Mar 19 10:27:59 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (syslog-ng-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 134db2e3d7b16bb70fd86d749cc2e4fd
-SHA256 (syslog-ng-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 6f1e22554eb7292d9322de0623fd13dbd11bdda8d52d66280c1d4e193a69fac7
-SIZE (syslog-ng-2.0.0.tar.gz) = 337553
+MD5 (syslog-ng-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 7ef12e1e43a99c5b6b8d1984dde72151
+SHA256 (syslog-ng-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 6b77a6b2b159afb2a089d70a8b5e6ef0c4e20f1401ba8e392fb99b1293a09d82
+SIZE (syslog-ng-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 352502
diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/files/patch-configure syslog-ng2-new/files/patch-configure
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng2/files/patch-configure	Thu Nov 16 12:41:23 2006
+++ syslog-ng2-new/files/patch-configure	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
@@ -1,32 +0,0 @@
---- configure.orig	Sat Oct 28 17:40:18 2006
-+++ configure	Thu Nov 16 10:45:49 2006
-@@ -341,7 +341,7 @@
- sbindir='${exec_prefix}/sbin'
- libexecdir='${exec_prefix}/libexec'
- datadir='${prefix}/share'
--sysconfdir='${prefix}/etc'
-+sysconfdir='${prefix}/etc/syslog-ng'
- sharedstatedir='${prefix}/com'
- localstatedir='${prefix}/var'
- libdir='${exec_prefix}/lib'
-@@ -3426,7 +3426,7 @@
- echo $ECHO_N "checking how to enable static linking for certain libraries... $ECHO_C" >&6
- ldversion=`ld -V 2>&1 | head -1`
- ostype=`uname -s`
--if echo $ldversion | egrep "GNU|Solaris" > /dev/null; then
-+if echo $ldversion | egrep "Solaris" > /dev/null; then
-         LD_START_STATIC="-Wl,-Bstatic"
-         LD_END_STATIC="-Wl,-Bdynamic"
-         echo "$as_me:$LINENO: result: GNU or Solaris" >&5
-@@ -3441,6 +3441,11 @@
-         LD_END_STATIC="-Wl,-bdynamic"
-         echo "$as_me:$LINENO: result: AIX" >&5
- echo "${ECHO_T}AIX" >&6
-+elif test "$ostype" = "FreeBSD"; then
-+        LD_START_STATIC=""
-+        LD_END_STATIC=""
-+        echo "$as_me:$LINENO: result: FreeBSD" >&5
-+echo "${ECHO_T}FreeBSD" >&6
- else
-         LD_START_STATIC=""
-         LD_END_STATIC=""
--- syslog-ng2.0.2.patch ends here ---
